seo_title: TappyType — Your handwriting becomes a real font | AI Korean handwriting font maker
seo_desc: Make your own Korean handwriting font on iPhone & iPad. Write a few characters and AI fills in the rest in your style, then export a real .ttf. On the App Store now.
og_title: TappyType — Your handwriting, a real font
og_desc: Write a few characters and AI fills in the rest of Hangul in your style. Export a real .ttf and use it anywhere. iPhone & iPad, on the App Store.
og_alt: TappyType — the AI app that turns your handwriting into a real Korean font
badge: Write 39 · the other 11,133 are one tap
hero_sub: Write a few characters with your finger or Apple Pencil, and AI fills in all 11,172 Hangul syllables in your style — your bias's name, a favorite lyric, your own name in 한글. Export a real .ttf and use it in GoodNotes, Procreate, Keynote — anywhere.
tt_note: ✍️ This is a real handwriting font made with TappyType — in the app, your writing looks like this.
how_sub: How your handwriting gets recognized and baked into a font — 55 seconds is enough. Here it is, step by step.
step1_p: Get TappyType on your iPhone or iPad, and Tappy is with you from the start.
step2_p: Follow the baseline and tracing hints for a few characters. It previews live as you write.
step4_p: A real font file — use it anywhere fonts work: GoodNotes, Procreate, Keynote, Word.
step3_p: Use your finished font in GoodNotes, calendars, notes — your handwriting, everywhere.
moment_title: Korean has 11,172 syllables. Write 39 — the rest is one tap.
moment_sub: Writing them all by hand is nearly impossible. TappyType's AI learns your style from the few you write and draws the rest to match.
fg_sub: Same sentence, a different hand each time — all real .ttf handwriting fonts.
fg_sample: 오늘 쓴 손글씨가 그대로 폰트가 됐어요
pc_title: Send postcards in your own hand
pc_sub: Your handwritten message over a photo or a soft color. Save to Photos or share it when you love it.
pv2_title: Your finished font, all over daily life
pv2_sub: GoodNotes diaries, Procreate lettering, Keynote, handwritten cards — real examples styled with your own handwriting font.
pv_title: No accounts, no ads, no tracking
pv_li1: Writing, preview, and font building all happen on your device.
pv_li2: Only when you use AI Tap, handwriting images are sent to our server — processed and immediately discarded, never stored.
st_title: How my handwriting became a real font
mk_title: Built by two friends who met at nine
mk_jiin: From design to the app to this very site — everything that reaches your hands.
mk_bobae: Computer vision is what got me into ML; 3+ years of production systems later — tabular classifiers, generative AI, LLM pipelines — I still care most about what a model does for the person using it. Here, that's something genuinely fun: teaching a model to read your 손글씨 and turn it into a font that's actually yours.
ig_sub: We document the build and updates on Instagram.
dl_sub:
Fill the first cell, and Tappy taps in the rest.
This is the moment your handwriting becomes a real font.
dl_qr: On desktop? Scan the code with your phone.
ft_tag: AI Korean handwriting font maker for iPhone & iPad
ft_download: Get it on the App Store
